<!--
PR body convention (mirrors the issue forms). Keep the four headings.
GitHub interaction here is English-only. Reference the issue this closes,
e.g. "Closes #123", in the Summary.
-->

## Summary

<!--
- What this PR does, in one or two sentences.
- The issue it closes (Closes #N).
-->

## Changes

<!--
- Bullet the notable changes, grouped by area.
- Call out anything reviewers should look at first.
-->

## Decision

<!--
- Why this approach over the alternatives.
- Trade-offs, follow-ups deliberately deferred, links to ADRs.
-->

## Tests

<!--
- How this was verified (which `make` targets, new specs).
- Coverage impact if relevant (>= 80%).
-->
